subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.HL.TZ1.17
question_html:
In which reaction does entropy decrease?

A.  NaCl (s) → NaCl (aq)

B.  Zn (s) + H2SO4 (aq) → ZnSO4 (aq) + H2 (g)

C.  NH3 (g) + HCl (g) → NH4Cl (s)

D.  CuCO3 (s) → CuO (s) + CO2 (g)
examiners_html: Second best answered question in the exam with 85% of candidates identifying the correct answering for reaction in which entropy decreases.
